title: Principal (server-stamped caller identity)
description: Resolved by console-api after authentication (Authentik forwardAuth for humans, bearer tokens for agents/services). NEVER trusted from the client. sender_class for dispatcher interop derives from kind + tier. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields. kind is bound at the AUTH PATH (Authentik header => human, bearer mint record => agent/system), never inferred from the id string; sender_class 'principal' requires kind==human AND tier in {owner, moderator} — an agent token can never reach it. Token revocation is checked per request (sha256 lookup), independent of the grant zookie; rotation grace is bounded and dual-validity windows are audited.

tiers.description: Permission levels (DB-defined rows, not an enum): owner, moderator, collaborator, guest, + future tiers. From Authentik groups / token scope.

lanes.description: Capability lanes for the command plane (operator, admin, term_admin, readonly, ...).

scopes.description: Resolved readable scope tags (zookie-fenced snapshot; revocation invalidates).

zookie.description: Consistency token for the grant snapshot this principal was resolved at.
